hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: .env file edit requires explicit confirmation'; exit 1; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if find . -maxdepth 3 -name 'Roadmap.md' 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then echo 'Reminder: Update Roadmap.md task markers if this commit changes progress'; fi; fi
